ChatGPT vs Claude

ChatGPT vs Claude
for your business.

We implement both. For most small business workflows — writing, research, analysis, client comms — Claude is the better tool. Here's the honest breakdown.

Get Claude Implemented → How We Implement
Honest comparison

Feature by feature.

From people who use both tools daily to build real business workflows.

Feature ChatGPT Claude Winner
Long-form writing quality Good, often generic Excellent, more nuanced Claude ✓
Instruction-following Tends to drift on complex tasks Reliably follows detailed instructions Claude ✓
Business tone & voice Needs heavy prompting Adapts naturally to your style Claude ✓
Coding & technical tasks Strong Strong Tie
Image generation DALL-E built in Not built in ChatGPT
Context window 128K tokens 200K tokens Claude ✓
Reasoning & analysis Strong with o1/o3 Excellent natively Claude ✓
Business integrations GPT plugins, many options Claude.ai + API Tie
Price (Pro tier) $20/mo $20/mo Tie
Best for SMB workflows Decent Purpose-built fit Claude ✓
Why Claude wins for SMB

Six reasons we recommend Claude
for most business teams.

01
It follows complex instructions reliably
Multi-step tasks, specific formatting requirements, brand voice rules — Claude follows them consistently. ChatGPT tends to drift on longer or more nuanced prompts.
02
Claude Projects is purpose-built for business
Persistent knowledge base, custom instructions per project, consistent context across sessions. No equivalent in ChatGPT for business workflow use.
03
Writing quality is meaningfully better
For business writing — proposals, client comms, reports — Claude produces cleaner, more natural output with less editing required.
04
Larger context window
Claude handles up to 200K tokens — useful for uploading long documents, RFPs, contracts, or research that ChatGPT would need to truncate.
05
Less hedging, more useful output
Claude is more direct and opinionated in its outputs. You spend less time prompting around refusals to get the business content you actually need.
06
Easier to implement at scale
The combination of Projects, system prompts, and knowledge bases makes Claude dramatically easier to implement consistently across a team.
